creator: alexz@visp.ru
text:
During "make release" before rotating "src/srelease" tarball doesn't
 executes "make clean" at /usr/src/release/doc. So built documentation and
 temporary files (article.html, article.html-text, etc.) are included into
 source distribution.
 
 Alexander Zagrebin
 JSC "Navigator"
 Vologda, Russia
 --
